description: Forms, ITRs, turnover packages, NCRs, daily reports, material traceability

requires: Gas test if near process areas

confined_space_permit.for: Manholes, vaults, tanks, cable trenches >4 ft deep
requires: Attendant at entry at all times
Shock and arc flash risk assessment

excavation_permit.for: Underground conduit, duct banks, ground grids
requires: GPR or potholing for critical crossings

daily_report_must_capture: Specific quantities completed (feet of conduit, terminations, instruments calibrated)
Delays with specific times and causes
Next day plan and resource needs
daily_report_rule: Daily reports are LEGAL DOCUMENTS. Write them as if a lawyer will read them in 3 years. Be specific: '120 LF of 2-inch RGS conduit in Unit 5, PR-12, elevation 30 ft, per E-2015 Rev 3' — not 'worked on electrical'.
turnover_package_contents: Test reports (megger, hipot, continuity, ground resistance, calibration, loop checks)
turnover_pro_tip: Start building turnover packages from DAY ONE. Backfilling paperwork is the #1 cause of late turnover.
NCR_when_to_issue: Procedures not followed (work past hold point)
NCR_rule: Never be afraid to write an NCR. Not writing one when you should is far worse than writing too many. Keep them factual, not blaming.
